title: Per-skill invocation metrics record
description: One JSONL line per skill invocation under .claude/state/metrics/<yyyy>-<mm>-<dd>.jsonl. additionalProperties is false at every layer so no PII or unintended fields can leak in.

trace_id.description: Stable identifier for this invocation. Sub-invocations carry the parent's trace_id in parent_trace_id.

parent_trace_id.description: Set on sub-invocations (subagent or pre-hydrate); null for top-level invocations.

skill.description: Skill name (e.g. dev-loop, pr-iteration, incident-intake). Lowercase alphanumeric + underscore + dash only; the writer (scripts/lib/metrics/record.mjs::writeRecord) enforces the same pattern at write time. The pattern is also a path-traversal guard since the per-day JSONL filename is derived from the started_at date, not the skill, but the skill name still appears in error messages and aggregator output where we want a stable shape.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at invocation start.

ended_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at invocation end.

model.description: Public model identifier (e.g. claude-opus-4-7); optional but recommended for cost-rate lookups.

cost_usd.description: Total cost computed from documented per-model rates. 6 decimal places of precision is plenty.

mcp_servers_used.description: MCP server names touched during this invocation. Names only; no payloads.

exit.description: Terminal status. 'halt' is a documented soft-stop (e.g. ambiguity-halt); 'fault' is in-flow; 'error' is environment / pre-condition.
